title: alchemilla pubescens var. infravallesia
intro: Alchemilla pubescens var. infravallesia, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Alchemilla pubescens var. infravallesia can be prepared as a tea or infusion, a tincture, or a salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various skin conditions and injuries.
